description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user scrolls to highlight one of the following teams: CHC, CLE, HOU, LAD, MIN, PHI, SEA, TB
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The {selected team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your favorite team. Move left, down, or up to continue to highlight teams to favorite. There is nothing selectable to the right.'
